case_title: ATIQUE REHMAN VS. DINA BOYER et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-31-2007 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DINA BOYER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS WAS HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT ORDERED THE HEARING OFF CALENDAR. THE ORDER FILED ON 1/24/07 IS VALID. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA
LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DINA BOYER AND NADIA CABEZAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS OVERRULED WITH FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CABEZAS, NADIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE (HEARING RESCHEDULED DUE TO COURT'S ERROR IN CALENDARING THE PREVIOUS HEARING FOR FEE WAIVER) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA HEARING SET FOR JAN-31-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA CABEZAS, NADIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DINA BOYER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECCESARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. DINA BOYER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: PATTY LEE-HUBBLE, CSR #3058
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF DINA BOYER ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REHMAN, ATIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, DINA CABEZAS, NADIA DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RESPONSE TO DEMURRER; P&A FILED BY PLAINTIFF REHMAN, ATIQUE
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
